pub surgeist_retained::ErrorCode::StaleId
pub surgeist_retained::ErrorCode::UnresolvedProjection
pub surgeist_retained::ErrorCode::UnsupportedFeature

pub struct surgeist_retained::Model
impl surgeist_retained::Model
pub fn surgeist_retained::Model::apply(&mut self, patch: surgeist_retained::Patch) -> surgeist_retained::Result<surgeist_retained::Report>
pub fn surgeist_retained::Model::apply_projection(&mut self, projection: surgeist_retained::ProjectionEdit) -> surgeist_retained::Result<surgeist_retained::Report>
pub fn surgeist_retained::Model::capture_pointer(&mut self, capture: surgeist_retained::PointerCapture) -> surgeist_retained::Result<surgeist_retained::Report>
pub fn surgeist_retained::Model::dispatch(&mut self, event: surgeist_retained::Event) -> surgeist_retained::Result<surgeist_retained::Report>
pub fn surgeist_retained::Model::empty() -> Self
pub fn surgeist_retained::Model::focus(&mut self, id: core::option::Option<surgeist_retained::Id>) -> surgeist_retained::Result<surgeist_retained::Report>
pub fn surgeist_retained::Model::mutate(&mut self, mutation: surgeist_retained::Mutation) -> surgeist_retained::Result<surgeist_retained::Report>
pub fn surgeist_retained::Model::new(root: surgeist_retained::Element) -> surgeist_retained::Result<Self>
pub fn surgeist_retained::Model::release_pointer(&mut self, pointer: surgeist_retained::PointerId) -> surgeist_retained::Result<surgeist_retained::Report>
pub fn surgeist_retained::Model::resolve_dirty_projections(&mut self) -> surgeist_retained::Result<surgeist_retained::Report>
pub fn surgeist_retained::Model::resolve_projection(&mut self, slot: surgeist_retained::ProjectionSlot) -> surgeist_retained::Result<surgeist_retained::Report>
pub const fn surgeist_retained::Model::root(&self) -> surgeist_retained::Id
pub fn surgeist_retained::Model::route(&self, event: surgeist_retained::Event) -> surgeist_retained::Result<surgeist_retained::Route>
pub fn surgeist_retained::Model::snapshot(&self) -> surgeist_retained::Snapshot<'_>
pub fn surgeist_retained::Model::take_changes(&mut self) -> surgeist_retained::ChangeSet
pub struct surgeist_retained::Mutation
impl surgeist_retained::Mutation
pub fn surgeist_retained::Mutation::edits(&self) -> &[surgeist_retained::MutationEdit]
pub fn surgeist_retained::Mutation::new() -> Self
pub fn surgeist_retained::Mutation::push(&mut self, edit: surgeist_retained::MutationEdit)
pub fn surgeist_retained::Mutation::with(edit: surgeist_retained::MutationEdit) -> Self
pub struct surgeist_retained::NodeRef<'a>
impl<'a> surgeist_retained::NodeRef<'a>
pub fn surgeist_retained::NodeRef<'a>::attributes(&self) -> &'a [surgeist_retained::Attribute]
pub fn surgeist_retained::NodeRef<'a>::classes(&self) -> &'a [surgeist_retained::Class]
pub fn surgeist_retained::NodeRef<'a>::id(&self) -> surgeist_retained::Id
pub fn surgeist_retained::NodeRef<'a>::key(&self) -> core::option::Option<&'a surgeist_retained::Key>
pub fn surgeist_retained::NodeRef<'a>::key_path(&self) -> &'a surgeist_retained::KeyPath
pub fn surgeist_retained::NodeRef<'a>::kind(&self) -> &'a surgeist_retained::Kind
pub fn surgeist_retained::NodeRef<'a>::parent(&self) -> core::option::Option<surgeist_retained::Id>
pub fn surgeist_retained::NodeRef<'a>::projected_parent(&self) -> core::option::Option<surgeist_retained::Id>
pub fn surgeist_retained::NodeRef<'a>::role(&self) -> surgeist_retained::Role
pub fn surgeist_retained::NodeRef<'a>::state(&self) -> &'a surgeist_retained::State
pub fn surgeist_retained::NodeRef<'a>::text(&self) -> core::option::Option<&'a surgeist_retained::Text>
pub struct surgeist_retained::PointerCapture
pub surgeist_retained::PointerCapture::pointer: surgeist_retained::PointerId
pub surgeist_retained::PointerCapture::target: surgeist_retained::Id
impl surgeist_retained::PointerCapture
pub const fn surgeist_retained::PointerCapture::new(pointer: surgeist_retained::PointerId, target: surgeist_retained::Id) -> Self
pub struct surgeist_retained::PointerId(_)
impl surgeist_retained::PointerId
pub const fn surgeist_retained::PointerId::get(self) -> u64
pub const fn surgeist_retained::PointerId::new(value: u64) -> Self
pub struct surgeist_retained::ProjectionEdit
impl surgeist_retained::ProjectionEdit
pub const fn surgeist_retained::ProjectionEdit::mode(&self) -> surgeist_retained::ReplaceMode
pub fn surgeist_retained::ProjectionEdit::new(slot: surgeist_retained::ProjectionSlot, source: surgeist_retained::ProjectionSource, mode: surgeist_retained::ReplaceMode) -> Self
pub fn surgeist_retained::ProjectionEdit::slot(&self) -> surgeist_retained::ProjectionSlot
pub fn surgeist_retained::ProjectionEdit::source(&self) -> &surgeist_retained::ProjectionSource
impl core::convert::From<surgeist_retained::ProjectionEdit> for surgeist_retained::MutationEdit
pub fn surgeist_retained::MutationEdit::from(edit: surgeist_retained::ProjectionEdit) -> Self
pub struct surgeist_retained::ProjectionSlot
impl surgeist_retained::ProjectionSlot
pub const fn surgeist_retained::ProjectionSlot::default(host: surgeist_retained::Id) -> Self
pub const fn surgeist_retained::ProjectionSlot::host(&self) -> surgeist_retained::Id
pub const fn surgeist_retained::ProjectionSlot::key(&self) -> &surgeist_retained::SlotKey
pub fn surgeist_retained::ProjectionSlot::named(host: surgeist_retained::Id, name: surgeist_retained::SlotName) -> Self
pub struct surgeist_retained::Report
impl surgeist_retained::Report
pub fn surgeist_retained::Report::changes(&self) -> &surgeist_retained::ChangeSet
pub fn surgeist_retained::Report::commands(&self) -> &[surgeist_retained::Command]
pub fn surgeist_retained::Report::empty() -> Self
pub fn surgeist_retained::Report::new(changes: surgeist_retained::ChangeSet) -> Self
pub fn surgeist_retained::Report::with_commands(changes: surgeist_retained::ChangeSet, commands: alloc::vec::Vec<surgeist_retained::Command>) -> Self
pub struct surgeist_retained::Route
impl surgeist_retained::Route
pub fn surgeist_retained::Route::new(steps: alloc::vec::Vec<surgeist_retained::RouteStep>) -> Self
pub fn surgeist_retained::Route::steps(&self) -> &[surgeist_retained::RouteStep]
pub struct surgeist_retained::RouteStep
pub surgeist_retained::RouteStep::id: surgeist_retained::Id
pub surgeist_retained::RouteStep::phase: surgeist_retained::Phase
impl surgeist_retained::RouteStep
pub const fn surgeist_retained::RouteStep::new(id: surgeist_retained::Id, phase: surgeist_retained::Phase) -> Self
pub struct surgeist_retained::SlotName(_)
impl surgeist_retained::SlotName
pub fn surgeist_retained::SlotName::as_str(&self) -> &str
pub fn surgeist_retained::SlotName::new(value: impl core::convert::AsRef<str>) -> surgeist_retained::Result<Self>
impl core::fmt::Debug for surgeist_retained::SlotName
pub fn surgeist_retained::SlotName::fmt(&self, f: &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::fmt::Display for surgeist_retained::SlotName
pub fn surgeist_retained::SlotName::fmt(&self, f: &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::str::traits::FromStr for surgeist_retained::SlotName
pub type surgeist_retained::SlotName::Err = surgeist_retained::Error
pub fn surgeist_retained::SlotName::from_str(value: &str) -> surgeist_retained::Result<Self>
pub struct surgeist_retained::Snapshot<'a>
impl<'a> surgeist_retained::Snapshot<'a>
pub fn surgeist_retained::Snapshot<'a>::ancestors(&self, id: surgeist_retained::Id) -> surgeist_retained::Result<impl core::iter::traits::iterator::Iterator<Item = surgeist_retained::Id> + '_>
pub fn surgeist_retained::Snapshot<'a>::by_class(&self, class: &surgeist_retained::Class) -> impl core::iter::traits::iterator::Iterator<Item = surgeist_retained::Id> + '_
pub fn surgeist_retained::Snapshot<'a>::by_role(&self, role: surgeist_retained::Role) -> impl core::iter::traits::iterator::Iterator<Item = surgeist_retained::Id> + '_
pub fn surgeist_retained::Snapshot<'a>::children(&self, id: surgeist_retained::Id) -> surgeist_retained::Result<impl core::iter::traits::iterator::Iterator<Item = surgeist_retained::Id> + '_>
pub fn surgeist_retained::Snapshot<'a>::descendants(&self, id: surgeist_retained::Id) -> surgeist_retained::Result<impl core::iter::traits::iterator::Iterator<Item = surgeist_retained::Id> + '_>
pub fn surgeist_retained::Snapshot<'a>::dirty_slots(&self) -> impl core::iter::traits::iterator::Iterator<Item = surgeist_retained::ProjectionSlot> + '_
pub fn surgeist_retained::Snapshot<'a>::effective_presence(&self, id: surgeist_retained::Id) -> surgeist_retained::Result<surgeist_retained::Presence>
pub fn surgeist_retained::Snapshot<'a>::find_key(&self, key_path: &surgeist_retained::KeyPath) -> core::option::Option<surgeist_retained::Id>
pub fn surgeist_retained::Snapshot<'a>::get(&self, id: surgeist_retained::Id) -> core::option::Option<surgeist_retained::NodeRef<'_>>
pub fn surgeist_retained::Snapshot<'a>::hooks(&self, id: surgeist_retained::Id) -> surgeist_retained::Result<&[surgeist_retained::Hook]>
pub fn surgeist_retained::Snapshot<'a>::is_input_eligible(&self, id: surgeist_retained::Id) -> surgeist_retained::Result<bool>
pub fn surgeist_retained::Snapshot<'a>::projected_ancestors(&self, id: surgeist_retained::Id) -> surgeist_retained::Result<impl core::iter::traits::iterator::Iterator<Item = surgeist_retained::Id> + '_>
pub fn surgeist_retained::Snapshot<'a>::projected_children(&self, slot: surgeist_retained::ProjectionSlot) -> surgeist_retained::Result<impl core::iter::traits::iterator::Iterator<Item = surgeist_retained::Id> + '_>
pub fn surgeist_retained::Snapshot<'a>::root(&self) -> surgeist_retained::Id
pub fn surgeist_retained::Snapshot<'a>::virtual_projection(&self, slot: surgeist_retained::ProjectionSlot) -> surgeist_retained::Result<core::option::Option<&surgeist_retained::VirtualProjection>>
pub struct surgeist_retained::SourceRevision(_)
impl surgeist_retained::SourceRevision
pub const fn surgeist_retained::SourceRevision::get(self) -> u64
pub const fn surgeist_retained::SourceRevision::new(value: u64) -> Self
#[non_exhaustive] pub struct surgeist_retained::State
pub surgeist_retained::State::active: bool
pub surgeist_retained::State::checked: core::option::Option<bool>
pub surgeist_retained::State::disabled: bool
pub surgeist_retained::State::expanded: core::option::Option<bool>
pub surgeist_retained::State::focus_within: bool
pub surgeist_retained::State::focused: bool
pub surgeist_retained::State::hovered: bool
pub surgeist_retained::State::pointer_captured: bool
pub surgeist_retained::State::presence: surgeist_retained::Presence
pub surgeist_retained::State::pressed: bool
pub surgeist_retained::State::selected: bool
impl surgeist_retained::State
pub fn surgeist_retained::State::durable_anchor(&self) -> Self
impl core::default::Default for surgeist_retained::State
pub fn surgeist_retained::State::default() -> Self
pub struct surgeist_retained::StatePatch
pub surgeist_retained::StatePatch::active: core::option::Option<bool>
pub surgeist_retained::StatePatch::checked: core::option::Option<core::option::Option<bool>>
pub surgeist_retained::StatePatch::disabled: core::option::Option<bool>
pub surgeist_retained::StatePatch::expanded: core::option::Option<core::option::Option<bool>>
pub surgeist_retained::StatePatch::hovered: core::option::Option<bool>
pub surgeist_retained::StatePatch::presence: core::option::Option<surgeist_retained::Presence>
pub surgeist_retained::StatePatch::pressed: core::option::Option<bool>
pub surgeist_retained::StatePatch::selected: core::option::Option<bool>
impl surgeist_retained::StatePatch
pub fn surgeist_retained::StatePatch::checked(self, checked: core::option::Option<bool>) -> Self
pub fn surgeist_retained::StatePatch::disabled(self, disabled: bool) -> Self
pub fn surgeist_retained::StatePatch::expanded(self, expanded: core::option::Option<bool>) -> Self
pub fn surgeist_retained::StatePatch::new() -> Self
pub fn surgeist_retained::StatePatch::presence(self, presence: surgeist_retained::Presence) -> Self
pub fn surgeist_retained::StatePatch::selected(self, selected: bool) -> Self
pub struct surgeist_retained::Tag(_)
impl surgeist_retained::Tag
pub fn surgeist_retained::Tag::as_str(&self) -> &str
pub fn surgeist_retained::Tag::new(value: impl core::convert::AsRef<str>) -> surgeist_retained::Result<Self>
impl core::fmt::Debug for surgeist_retained::Tag
pub fn surgeist_retained::Tag::fmt(&self, f: &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::fmt::Display for surgeist_retained::Tag
pub fn surgeist_retained::Tag::fmt(&self, f: &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::str::traits::FromStr for surgeist_retained::Tag
pub type surgeist_retained::Tag::Err = surgeist_retained::Error
pub fn surgeist_retained::Tag::from_str(value: &str) -> surgeist_retained::Result<Self>
pub struct surgeist_retained::Text(_)
impl surgeist_retained::Text
pub fn surgeist_retained::Text::as_str(&self) -> &str
pub fn surgeist_retained::Text::new(value: impl core::convert::AsRef<str>) -> surgeist_retained::Result<Self>
impl core::fmt::Debug for surgeist_retained::Text
pub fn surgeist_retained::Text::fmt(&self, f: &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::fmt::Display for surgeist_retained::Text
pub fn surgeist_retained::Text::fmt(&self, f: &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
pub struct surgeist_retained::Value(_)
impl surgeist_retained::Value
pub fn surgeist_retained::Value::as_str(&self) -> &str
pub fn surgeist_retained::Value::empty() -> Self
pub fn surgeist_retained::Value::new(value: impl core::convert::AsRef<str>) -> surgeist_retained::Result<Self>
impl core::fmt::Debug for surgeist_retained::Value
pub fn surgeist_retained::Value::fmt(&self, f: &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl core::fmt::Display for surgeist_retained::Value
pub fn surgeist_retained::Value::fmt(&self, f: &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
pub struct surgeist_retained::VirtualItem
impl surgeist_retained::VirtualItem
pub fn surgeist_retained::VirtualItem::element(&self) -> &surgeist_retained::Element
pub const fn surgeist_retained::VirtualItem::index(&self) -> usize
pub fn surgeist_retained::VirtualItem::key(&self) -> &surgeist_retained::Key
pub fn surgeist_retained::VirtualItem::new(index: usize, key: surgeist_retained::Key, element: surgeist_retained::Element) -> surgeist_retained::Result<Self>
pub struct surgeist_retained::VirtualProjection
impl surgeist_retained::VirtualProjection
pub fn surgeist_retained::VirtualProjection::dense(total_count: usize, range: surgeist_retained::VirtualRange, items: alloc::vec::Vec<surgeist_retained::VirtualItem>) -> surgeist_retained::Result<Self>
pub fn surgeist_retained::VirtualProjection::items(&self) -> &[surgeist_retained::VirtualItem]
pub const fn surgeist_retained::VirtualProjection::range(&self) -> surgeist_retained::VirtualRange
pub const fn surgeist_retained::VirtualProjection::source_revision(&self) -> core::option::Option<surgeist_retained::SourceRevision>
pub const fn surgeist_retained::VirtualProjection::total_count(&self) -> usize
pub fn surgeist_retained::VirtualProjection::with_source_revision(self, revision: surgeist_retained::SourceRevision) -> Self
pub struct surgeist_retained::VirtualRange
impl surgeist_retained::VirtualRange
pub const fn surgeist_retained::VirtualRange::end(&self) -> usize
pub const fn surgeist_retained::VirtualRange::is_empty(&self) -> bool
pub const fn surgeist_retained::VirtualRange::len(&self) -> usize
pub fn surgeist_retained::VirtualRange::new(start: usize, end: usize) -> surgeist_retained::Result<Self>
pub const fn surgeist_retained::VirtualRange::start(&self) -> usize
pub type surgeist_retained::Result<T> = core::result::Result<T, surgeist_retained::Error>
